summary: Tested 6 local-inference CLI assertions: 5 passed, 1 failed (VAL-LOCAL-011 lacked the required path/remediation details on model-init failure).

assertions.title: CLI --local flag activates local inference
assertions.reason: The local-feature binary returned successful search results with --local while all EMBEDDING_* and RERANKER_* environment variables were explicitly unset.

commands: cd /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cli-local-flows/local_repo && env -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY -u RERANKER_MODEL_BASE_URL -u RERANKER_MODEL_ID -u RERANKER_MODEL_API_KEY HOME=/tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cli-local-flows/home /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/bin/vera-local search --local local_magic_value --json
observations: Exit code 0.
Top result was src/math_utils.py::local_magic_value.
stderr size was 0 bytes after the warm-cache reranker download run.

assertions.title: VERA_LOCAL=1 env var activates local inference
assertions.reason: Running the same query with VERA_LOCAL=1 succeeded without API credentials and produced JSON identical to the --local run.

commands: cd /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cli-local-flows/local_repo && env -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY -u RERANKER_MODEL_BASE_URL -u RERANKER_MODEL_ID -u RERANKER_MODEL_API_KEY HOME=/tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cli-local-flows/home VERA_LOCAL=1 /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/bin/vera-local search local_magic_value --json
observations: Exit code 0.
Output equality check against the --local run returned true.
Top result was src/math_utils.py::local_magic_value.

assertions.title: Index model mismatch detection
assertions.reason: Cross-provider searches failed in both directions with exit code 1 and explicit model/dimension mismatch errors plus a re-index instruction.

commands: cd /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cli-local-flows/api_repo && env -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY -u RERANKER_MODEL_BASE_URL -u RERANKER_MODEL_ID -u RERANKER_MODEL_API_KEY HOME=/tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cli-local-flows/home /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/bin/vera-local search --local api_magic_value --json

set -a && source /home/lamim/Development/Tools/Vera/secrets.env && set +a && cd /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cli-local-flows/local_repo && /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/bin/vera-default search local_magic_value --json
observations: API-indexed repo metadata recorded Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B with 1024 dimensions.

API-indexed -> local search error: "Index was created with model 'Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B' (1024 dimensions), but you are using model 'jina-embeddings-v5-text-nano-retrieval'. Please re-index with matching provider."

Local-indexed -> API search error: "Index was created with model 'jina-embeddings-v5-text-nano-retrieval' (768 dimensions), but you are using model 'Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B'. Please re-index with matching provider."

assertions.title: Graceful error when models missing and download fails
assertions.reason: A safe missing-model simulation (fresh HOME set to a regular file so model download/init could not create ~/.vera) exited 1 without panicking, but the CLI error omitted the expected cache path and remediation guidance required by the contract.

commands: cd /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cli-local-flows/local_repo && env -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY -u RERANKER_MODEL_BASE_URL -u RERANKER_MODEL_ID -u RERANKER_MODEL_API_KEY HOME=/tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cli-local-flows/bad-home-file /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/bin/vera-local search --local local_magic_value --json
observations: Exit code 1.
stderr was: "Error: Failed to initialize local embedding provider: embedding API error (status 500): Failed to download ONNX model: Not a directory (os error 20)".
No panic text appeared, but the message did not include the expected cache path or a remediation hint.

assertions.title: vera index --local succeeds independently
assertions.reason: vera index --local completed successfully without sourced API credentials, created a .vera index, and stored the local model metadata with 768 dimensions.

commands: env -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY -u RERANKER_MODEL_BASE_URL -u RERANKER_MODEL_ID -u RERANKER_MODEL_API_KEY HOME=/tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cli-local-flows/home /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/bin/vera-local index --local /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cli-local-flows/local_repo --json
observations: Exit code 0.
Index summary reported 1 parsed file, 2 chunks, and 2 embeddings.
metadata.db stored model_name=jina-embeddings-v5-text-nano-retrieval and embedding_dim=768.
.vera/metadata.db, vectors.db, and bm25 files were created in the repo.

assertions.title: vera update --local works
assertions.reason: After editing one indexed file, vera update --local reported exactly one modified file, kept the local 768-dimension metadata, and made the new symbol searchable.

commands: env -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY -u RERANKER_MODEL_BASE_URL -u RERANKER_MODEL_ID -u RERANKER_MODEL_API_KEY HOME=/tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cli-local-flows/home /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/bin/vera-local update --local /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cli-local-flows/local_repo --json

cd /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cli-local-flows/local_repo && env -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY -u RERANKER_MODEL_BASE_URL -u RERANKER_MODEL_ID -u RERANKER_MODEL_API_KEY HOME=/tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cli-local-flows/home /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/bin/vera-local search --local added_after_update --json
observations: Exit code 0.
Update summary reported files_modified=1, files_added=0, files_deleted=0.
Post-update metadata still recorded model_name=jina-embeddings-v5-text-nano-retrieval and embedding_dim=768.
Post-update search returned src/math_utils.py::added_after_update as the top result.
